---
title: "Newsletter October 2022"
date: 2022-10-24
subtitle: "Our second newsletter"
categories: ["Newsletters"]
flyer:
    - file: "assets/newsletter_2022_october.pdf"
      title: LMU OSC Newsletter - October 2022

template: templates/news-template.html
filters:
  - templates/process-news-yaml.lua
---
